notes: so look I've been walking around the site for the last hour and heres kinda where everythings at right, so first off the brickies are going great guns on the east wall theyre about 2 thirds of the way up to plate height which is good cos the roof trusses are coming next wednesday and we need that wall done by then, Davo reckons theyll be done monday and I believe him cos his crew has been smashing it, theyve got 4 guys on it and theyre laying about 400 bricks a day each which is solid, anyway the mortar colour looks consistent which is good cos on the last job they had that issue where some batches were lighter than others and the client had a fit

the other thing is the plumber Richo has roughed in all the sewer and stormwater under the slab in zone A but theres a problem with the fall on one of the stormwater lines, its only got like 1 in 150 fall and the spec says 1 in 100 minimum, I told him about it and he said he'll fix it this arvo but between you and me I think he knew about it and was hoping nobody would notice, anyway I took a photo of the level on the pipe so we've got a record in case it comes up at inspection

oh and also I nearly forgot the client Sarah came by this morning with her interior designer and they spent about an hour looking at the bathroom tile layout, long story short they want to change the feature wall from the herringbone pattern to a straight stack bond pattern which doesnt really affect us much structurally or anything but it does mean the tiler needs new setting out marks and the waterproofer might need to come back because the niche locations are changing by about 200mm. I said any changes need to be in writing and she said shell email through a variation request by end of day. we'll see.

last thing, the skip bin is overflowing again. I've called the waste company three times this week and they keep saying tomorrow. if they dont pick it up by friday I'm calling someone else. its a OH&S issue having rubbish piling up around the bin. also theres some broken glass near the site entry that needs to be cleaned up before someone drives over it. getting the laborer onto it now.
